raw:
## Completed
Implemented Tier 1, 2, and 4 anti-rubber-stamp guards:
- Gate 1 risky assumptions/questions now get `[unsubstantiated — verify or downgrade]` when they lack concrete evidence.
- Planner prompt now requires self-resolution before raising risky questions.
- Gate 2 high-risk-path ships now require deliberate confirmation: `foreman({ resume: true, approve: true, confirm: "SHIP <slug>" })`.

## Files Changed
- `.pi/foreman.json` - added `approvalfriction_test.sh` to verify gate.
- `extensions/foreman/approvalfriction.ts` - new pure approval friction decider.
- `extensions/foreman/index.ts` - wired elevated Gate 2 confirm enforcement and banner.
- `extensions/foreman/scorer.ts` - added `hasVerifiableEvidence()` and unsubstantiated marking.
- `extensions/foreman/planner.ts` - renders Gate 1 unsubstantiated annotation.
- `extensions/foreman/teampacket.ts` - carries unsubstantiated annotation into team relay packet.
- `extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md` - added Tier 2 self-resolve/question-raising guard.
- `extensions/foreman/test/scorer_test.sh` - added evidence/annotation tests.
- `extensions/foreman/test/approvalfriction_test.sh` - new pure + grep guard tests.
- `extensions/foreman/docs/INTERNALS.md` - documented approval friction and evidence guard.

## How To Verify
```bash
grep -q "claude-opus-4-8:xhigh" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/scorer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/approvalfriction_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/teampacket_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/docer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh
```

## Notes
- Verification passed.
- Tier 3 calibration/outcome tracking was not built.
- Normal Gate 2 ships remain one-tap `approve:true`; only elevated high-risk-path ships require `confirm: "SHIP <slug>"`.
